name: hyperflow
description: Engineering system for AI coding agents: project memory across sessions, doctrine/rules, task templates, and a Worker-to-Reviewer multi-agent chain. Turn a GitHub issue into a reviewed PR. 19 skills, 22 specialists, lean mode, local artefacts. Claude Code (primary), Codex CLI (preview; desktop App pending certification), OpenCode, Grok, Antigravity, Cursor.
